heroHeadline: IS-Sahel Kills 6 in Niger's Tillabéri; FAMa-Mauritania Border Incident Resolved; JNIM Fuel Truce Holds
heroSubtitle: Tracking over a decade of jihadist insurgency, three coups, Wagner/Africa Corps presence, and the collapse of the Western-backed regional security architecture across Mali, Burkina Faso, and Niger.
footerNote: Data sourced from ACLED, RFI, Le Monde, Crisis Group, UN OHCHR, HRW, SIPRI, AFP, Bloomberg, and Institute for Economics & Peace. All figures approximate unless stated.
